title: Vert.x Verticle Deployment Descriptor
description: JSON Schema for Vert.x verticle deployment options used when deploying verticles programmatically or via configuration.

main.description: The main verticle class name or script path to deploy.

instances.description: Number of verticle instances to deploy.

multiThreaded.description: Deploy as a multi-threaded worker verticle.

isolationGroup.description: Isolation group for the verticle classloader.

isolatedClasses.description: List of class name patterns to isolate.

extraClasspath.description: Extra classpath entries for the verticle.

config.description: JSON configuration passed to the verticle.

workerPoolName.description: Name of the worker pool to use.

maxWorkerExecuteTime.description: Max worker execute time in nanoseconds.
